---
title: "Homework Assignments"
author: "Bill Perry"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    toc: false
    downloads: []
    embed-resources: false
    self-contained: false

listing:
  contents: "*_homework/*.qmd"   # matches WW_MM_<slug>_homework folders
  type: table
  sort: "order asc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  categories: false
  fields: [order, week, title, description]
  field-display-names:
    order: "Homework #"
    week: "Week"
    title: "Homework"
    description: "Description"
  field-types:
    order: number
---

Homework assignments are posted here, pulled straight from each file's YAML
frontmatter (`order:`, `week:`, `description:`) — nothing on this page is
hand-typed. Ordering comes from the `order:` field, filled in automatically by
the `sync_order_from_folder_names.R` pre-render hook from each folder's `WW_MM_`
number prefix. Click one to view the details, due dates, and submission instructions.
